textByHash.019288edc46c6392108a95537461adb296b2d896: Nobody would build anything in this wasteland unless they were forced to, to survive.
textByHash.0434a4f36281f5f5103a57b5e40456c5dbc6ad3f: Come back and see me when you have the necessary funds to buy.
textByHash.05ac796d78949f93326142640413773e882c8aa8: Ah, it all begun many generations ago, when our ancestors were the proud rulers of these lands...
textByHash.0b78ca1b7c3c1e3fa49f76071f2a1db5c51e27a3: Stranger, if you were to bring me an Ancient staff, I believe it would be possible to combine it with this icon to create a powerful new weapon.
textByHash.0b82f7f21fe3714ae2936249e3f8fd538ea9d58a: Fascinating... I've never seen anything like this before, but the magic contained within is unmistakable. I wonder...
textByHash.0ba208d0de7563f66d161c57da505c13dbe18fcc: Please accept my apologies noble sir! I thought you were but some opportunistic thief, looking to steal what heritage we have left! Now I see that you are in fact a brave adventurer,
textByHash.0d87740cfd4bb9df7d7fa1578a55f84eff5cd8e2: The insults heaped upon my race will never be forgotten, will never be forgiven and will never again be overlooked.
textByHash.0eb1cd05d924b1ec1fa602591bd6fa107c6299ba: It is a long story, and I doubt you have much interest in hearing it. Your sort never are, you just take what you can of ours, and then abandon us once more to the desert.
textByHash.16b3137550b07710dbc7aa52373153ebbf77c7a3: always be ready with our blades for our righteous vengeance.
textByHash.1bde0fa566890fed2f6bd085d6d734c619ac84a3: So have you spoken to my Lord Azzanadra yet?
textByHash.1fbdf708913f34b41fa2ba17ebf9a3212a8ef4eb: In addition, for the actual spell to enchant the glasses, I will require one set of normal bones, some ash, some charcoal and a single blood rune.
textByHash.20e9458ed54f95d48a5b0b1768f44c1ebf5371b7: magic of our god. This heirloom will help you with the speed of your spell-casting.
textByHash.22b5dd93c2129e7f33c51723fa896b7439007d6b: I will find a suitable spot in the desert to the East of here, and set them up. When you are ready to begin your search, please come and find me there, I will show you how to utilise the
textByHash.2320f7ecc177af234fba6abad7d25e793f903651: For this spell, I will need to make some scrying glasses. I will need enough so that we can view the realm in its entirety.
textByHash.23c35294d79a0216476ae3c969cba72d8b4d92a9: Please, when you have freed Azzanadra, let me know what words he has for his faithful followers...
textByHash.30aed3277b86b1e62287fc615b740bf47337e748: In the end, they cast a spell upon him, to trap him in the stone structure to the South of here.
textByHash.325d97f1cd8903e4adf4d20c8152f369a48f35eb: If I knew of any treasure I would not choose to spend my life in this gods-forsaken desert.
textByHash.384422e5e2d59ae9ca61cbd4f1641a4e02f643e9: As you wish. I should have known not to get my hopes up that our long cursed life may soon be at an end...
textByHash.399da3c9c115defdb0e76c24097b56c031cc1b64: (sigh) I suppose I can spare you that. What do you wish to know about?
textByHash.3c9be00288a758b9fc31f09f1ebc36d094f963cf: I can only focus upon the aura the diamonds have left behind them, so any place where the Diamonds were present for a significant period of time will still be shown - such as the Bandit Camp where I make my home.
textByHash.47b07bc85444f75ee4dc430d0fc52a8d715bd294: And with that our lands, our homes, our very lives were stolen from us! Too weak to reclaim what was rightfully ours, we made our homes here, knowing that someday Azzanadra will
textByHash.4bfda9344aff7be9755758ad23df64616ff0debb: You have no right to be here! You have no right to the life you have, for it was taken at our expense!
textByHash.4cc671f2205cc5f79ef32cf02f98cdd9b837abe0: You should expect the warriors to have taken some aspect of these diamonds as their own...
textByHash.4ce928bfb48d6ec9acb41b6c63a75d0b158413ee: Leave us to our fate. We care nothing for the world that betrayed us, or those that come from it.
textByHash.4d94a2a7cf4a4bc87c03946d6e0573b2337d5c95: The path will be hard, for his prison is full of traps and danger to prevent his rescue, but he will reward you beyond your wildest dreams when freed!
textByHash.4f15d7d6a25359aa31d3d47bec717f3d8634bf52: As you wish. Bear my offer in mind should you ever change your decision, I will remain here.
textByHash.5740f1bd2da0165fa94e46d69446edf79c762dcb: can't be any more help than that.
textByHash.5901e211a118b3476348b81022753e953f8ee8d2: Stranger... Do not abuse my generosity... I cannot possibly sell it for less than 80,000 gold.
textByHash.5ab304b860367e9dd6c0523569b49ff5fa4b251a: I suspect they will not willingly part with such objects of power however.
textByHash.5bdc9ab8f70e73afea3b79eccea82f6258b480e9: The four pillars surrounding the structure are keeping the containment spell intact. By placing a diamond into each, you will breach the magical defenses and begin to restore Azzanadra's
textByHash.5bef89081177df5371c0b58ad4734c4ddcd5f6dc: When enchanted, the scrying glass will be able to let us view any area that has been influenced by the presence of the Diamonds of Azzanadra.
textByHash.5d359b36ce208baa412cefc7592213f1b5d7f55c: Take care of it, it is the only heirloom from those times I possess, although rumour has it many of our ancient warriors were buried with identical weapons so that they could continue to fight for my Lord in their deaths.
textByHash.5e25fc97e311ee6f616f8ef21de992d89bba20d4: Thank you, that blood rune should be sufficient for the spell.
textByHash.5f67dc9e951df6c85a63fd21e1e949067fe65221: magic of our god. This heirloom will help you with the speed of your spell- casting.
textByHash.5f87bfb5a3699a2fbbda8934bf1bf88272328274: Is your desire for our freedom strong enough? Will you gather the ingredients for this spell for me?
textByHash.60ba18ffa2670f678942eb4de919f1ebd8fe014d: They were stolen by warriors of the false god Zamorak generations ago. When you find the warriors, you will find the diamonds.
textByHash.60c4ac7e49eb4006101e2b8a5cc8628f028f5b3f: It is understandable perhaps... His poor mind must be addled after all of those years of confinement, he would not willingly ignore his followers...
textByHash.6384bf9097ad827818ddb11f9503b547a524429c: Ah, that was the power being re-absorbed back into them. That should have been sufficient to break the magic seal preventing anyone exiting or entering the structure.
textByHash.63d366fc4d9caed21aa05f8193cc94124bda9cf7: Thank you, pass over the ingredients so that I may begin working on the spell.
textByHash.651d72faf61924dcc1d5407cda88fe2331d0cadf: Quickly, you must let Lord Azzanadra know that he is free again after these many years!
textByHash.6b0b4acdc0f293d9aa000fa9c47692a31e6ae760: There you go. Wield its power responsibly, stranger...
textByHash.6c4dbdce52fa5cff0f3192bc97aa4a2afbaa3744: Yes, it is exactly like your sort to waste my time in such a way.
textByHash.6e79e256a022123e23c93650ed21ecf5179155f5: With each battle they waged, we lost more and more land, unable to fight on all fronts, and were pushed further and further South into this gods-forsaken desert.
textByHash.715ae9f7c03dc4bbf244e06c5a1f0b9138607706: My apologies, but magic is an inaccurate art in many respects.
textByHash.73bd8867339546c0bc4a817075adb883a14fe051: Should you be willing to get these ingredients for me, I will be able to locate the rough area where each of these warriors has taken refuge. The spell is imprecise, but it should help you get on the
textByHash.771de4c98abd147c79fe7bb01f99cc32ef608499: 12 magic logs 6 steel bars 6 molten glass
textByHash.7a4d6df0d803f490e544b593a501606cf4840087: Go, place the diamonds, and free my lord Azzanadra!
textByHash.7dd6a9c0f55bd8e1dfe489b5a6817a659f11bb6a: As I say, the enchantment is very inaccurate.
textByHash.83db381ece628ef0beac2302a249155210fe44a6: This is the treasure which you seek???
textByHash.846db0e3e82a352ef49e03e14a753a3b57cebdf6: Our god was kind to us, and blessed us with prosperity and happiness, and in return we were merciless to his enemies wherever we found them.
textByHash.87688078be791c10d5542d5b748ae20e62e41f21: And what words did he have for his followers?
textByHash.8c237e71ad8b2b8b588e99839b063a6235fbc11c: Azzanadra was our greatest ever hero. He was unkillable, and the cowardly traitors who stole our lands did not know what to do with him, for his hatred for them was as strong as his magics.
textByHash.95969f58de7e20d0337f78451d95e98997d3c768: Thank you, those are enough bones for the spell.
textByHash.9a4d3d7a471f1db36281317f4b877a74db8b7619: There is an ancient spell I know of that may spy upon such power... But it will require a few ingredients for it to work.
textByHash.9c4f4aedd383b0295bf6e1bbc06c053450dc8d69: There is the Diamond of Blood, the Diamond of Ice, the Diamond of Smoke and the Diamond of Shadow.
textByHash.a2e61d8d9b49fd13f723cd7bc5d7b9ffecdea8f6: Don't forget to come back here when you have collected all four diamonds.
textByHash.a7a42ef395f2de31a0be7152cdf9514709ade73c: Someday, a harsh wind will blow upon this land, uncovering the wrongs of the past, and we will get back what is rightfully ours. Until such a day we will bide our time here, and will
textByHash.a903dce0db6b0a13cd7d49083bd7487190619fef: That is a good start... but Azzanadra is still imprisoned!
textByHash.ac92ef967cdc42276b09cd4f41c51847c1f53832: looking to restore our glories back upon us!
textByHash.b13c07df300637371fb35e9fbcbba1e63498fc83: Without his protection, we were forced to fend for ourselves once more, against the enemies that sought to destroy us through their petty jealousies.
textByHash.b4ab6eb1a99b643667750fa21432a2b212f91ecf: I see you have the staff with you. Would you like me to combine your Ancient staff with the icon to create an Ancient sceptre? You won't be able to separate them once this is done.
textByHash.b643e3515e09b192dbed9b1709dda522684fe36c: Greetings. I await the return of my Lord Azzanadra and of our god. I do not know why, but I feel this spot has some significance...
textByHash.b89a457363bb2eb57b95436c56d8cc323d6c4a54: That is because, from our point of view, you have.
textByHash.bc08f3cb75a3d2e4860b6faec4f19fc7da026016: return with his magnificent power, and bring us back to our former glory...
textByHash.bc8eaae790e29553dde2aba4fda9e424b4f6605c: I know of no fortress, I know of no reason why anyone would ever bother doing anything out here in the desert.
textByHash.bec3d3ab8def4442648ba16828c9ed4ea79c6278: Normally I could not bear to part with such a priceless relic, but for your help in freeing my Lord Azzanadra, I will be prepared to sell it to you for a mere 80,000 gold.
textByHash.bed1221b56bc901c87d78bfe38da6dc2aa2309cf: Ah yes. The only time people care about our existence is when they think they have something to gain from us.
textByHash.c243d86d68fe08a5eda94fd43c67f58df23e9e28: Then return to me when you have the staff.
textByHash.c5501623df7d234846f831c09bd5240d7d9dca84: Before I can complete the spell I will still need the following items;
textByHash.c5951895ce74c812a416b65dc9ce0cdc75005f8f: 1 bones, 1 ashes, 1 charcoal and 1 blood rune
textByHash.cc830f5a98b443ba595547f22e8a3c3a545d9f8c: But we did not succumb without fighting! The spiteful Saradomin and pathetic Zamorak warred with each other, but the hatred they had for each other was as nothing to the hatred they held towards us!
textByHash.d2088ff6828e4fc21f8ba0b38f47734eb1b493e5: Our greatest hero, Azzanadra, was finally trapped in a strange stone structure to the South of here, and bound within by terrible powers...
textByHash.d28cc40eab06d7fff29f6d451ab779738ea821f1: Quickly... After all these centuries, Lord Azzanadra is nearly free! You must spare no time, place the Diamonds upon the pillars and enter the pyramid so that you may free him!
textByHash.d2cbaecff68d8043412990048793917616e8f428: Well, six scrying glasses should be sufficient. For each scrying glass, I will need two magic logs, a steel bar and some molten glass. This makes a total of 12 magic logs, 6 pieces of molten
textByHash.d574b31fd66811a3e3a35385acebe2c4af2d819b: My ancestors lived far to the North of here, and our lands stretched from the sea in the East to the river Lum, and the mountain of ice. From coast to coast, North to South, our domain was absolute.
textByHash.d7416cfe650d3c1def32c8a2f7720cfdd1f0e760: Beware too, for these warriors are very powerful; they have taken the powers of the diamonds into themselves!
textByHash.dd59f9cc234935ed46c50aef818ed1a7fe5c98ca: Meet me again in the desert East of here, I will use these ingredients to create a scrying glass for you.
textByHash.e1cfef0033f964426b091311618e8f7a2ce567f0: power, and be able to enter the structure.
textByHash.e1f84e84b7f60735ccb8cc3a4322159518f3c286: Each diamond has an elemental quality...
textByHash.e3f120fe10693919f53ef4d698a529e29df501cc: Excellent! Those are all the ingredients I need to create the scrying glasses.
textByHash.eec67914fad61ff89d76ce92aec23c80fbd5a3b5: I have nothing to say to you. You and your kind are not welcome here.
textByHash.efa4972c078b93b902701ae6178ae992cb6ab31a: Thank you, that is enough ash for the spell.
textByHash.f0ec69e71ccc0f779bab9367d8df0d212e6cb8ac: No, the magic used in this spell is powerful, but inaccurate. The direction the scrying glass faces is roughly the direction you will find the warrior, but I'm afraid I
textByHash.f1894b9b07e171f6dd64f34d95bfbdda34f169db: Anyway, if he has taught you our ancient magics, you may be interested in purchasing an ancient heirloom that was passed down to me. My ancestor fought in the ancient battles using the
textByHash.f253fda02a020e9adf23f689f80ba1e6eb38faf5: Our god was banished, leaving us helpless to our fates.
textByHash.f6ae01ce7ff619681b2e581dc5c91ca836b6154b: Thank you, that is enough charcoal for the spell.
textByHash.f9b56c4493c118a51301303a3d99d3cf63902925: They stole his very life force, the essence of his power, and trapped it within four crystals - the very same Four Diamonds which you have now recovered from the brigands who stole from us.
textByHash.fa4c8b54d2c88cfe936e9553cb5fd4e5dbbb0196: Standard bones. Other types of bones are of no use to me in this spell.
textByHash.ff9671b1d2cc0cab8bf9f3ef93e9f8c89e7b7683: Heard of them? Of course I have heard of them! They are the legacy of the great Mahjarrat hero, Azzanadra!
